title: ligusticum dubium
intro: Ligusticum dubium is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family, commonly known as a type of mountain yam or a variety of the more widely recognized Chinese angelica. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ligusticum dubium include its ability to alleviate fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and improve digestion. Ligusticum dubium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and its dried roots and rhizomes are also used in traditional medicine to create herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions.
